summary: Iteration 125: Verified two new features - (1) created_by_name field display in expenses and sales, (2) Salary category shows Employee selector. All 6 backend tests passed. All 3 frontend tests passed.

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error - <tr> cannot be child of <span>, <span> cannot be child of <tbody>. This is a React/HTML nesting warning (pre-existing from previous iterations).

critical_code_review_comments: HTML table structure warning persists in both ExpensesPage.jsx and SalesPage.jsx - consider using React.Fragment instead of span wrappers for table body rows
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 125 features verified: (1) GET /api/expenses and GET /api/sales now return 'created_by_name' field resolved from user IDs - both backend APIs and frontend display tested working. (2) Expense form Salary category shows Employee selector instead of Supplier selector (lines 333-349 ExpensesPage.jsx). (3) delete_policy for expenses and sales is correctly set to 'admin_manager' in database. HTML hydration warnings in table structure are pre-existing issues from previous iterations.

sales_created_by_name_backend.details: All 10 sales in response had created_by_name populated with 'SSC Admin'

sales_created_by_name_frontend.test_case: Expanded sale rows show creator name
sales_created_by_name_frontend.details: Found 3 sale-created-by elements displaying 'SSC Admin' in expanded row view

admin_can_delete_expense.test_case: Admin user can successfully delete expense
admin_can_delete_expense.details: Created and deleted test expense - admin bypass working correctly

salary_category_employee_selector.test_case: Salary category shows Employee selector instead of Supplier
salary_category_employee_selector.details: When Salary category selected, Employee label visible with '-No Employee-' dropdown, Supplier label hidden

tests: TEST 1: Salary category shows Employee selector - PASS
TEST 2: created_by_name in expenses expanded rows - PASS
TEST 3: created_by_name in sales expanded rows - PASS
